1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px multi-column layout split panel)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Two-Column Workspace Shell (Left Side Panel: Purchase Order Master Stream Table Grid; Right Side Panel Workspace: High-Precision Multi-Line Item Itemization Matrix & Dynamic Totals Calculator; Contextual Top Banner: Stage Progression Ribbon [Draft -> Pending Approval -> Issued -> Partially Received -> Closed])

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Renders simultaneous stream grid and line item worksheet panel side-by-side)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (Line item worksheet expands to a full workspace view, collapsing the master log into a quick-toggle left drawer track)

user_progression_routes.on_load: Extract global tenant configuration parameters -> Establish state buffer for currency fields -> Execute data payload request fetch from ProductManagementService.getPurchaseOrders()
user_progression_routes.on_po_row_click: Populate po_line_item_worksheet with deep array data for individual item rows matching selected record pointers variables

redirection_rules.condition: If an active Purchase Order total valuation metrics exceed a user role's strict financial clearance thresholds parameters
redirection_rules.action: Deactivate standard issue triggers immediately, present an inline warning status banner 'Requires Executive Authorization', and lock line item rows inputs

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User hits actions trigger button element 'btn_create_new_po'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop multi-step dialog interface modal capturing vendor lookup IDs, localized warehouse drop destinations, shipping timelines parameters, and initial line items arrays

atoms.type: Tabular Intercepting Numeric Input Box Component

molecules.composition: Combines monospaced PO serial number sequence key + destination facility identifier label + aggregated value display block + timestamp metadata badge components
Combines part number catalog selector dropdown + unit price numeric input box + quantity input box + computed row total display node + remove row element button icon

organisms.composition: High-density data matrix grouping historical rows featuring robust multi-tier column filtering mechanics, tracking states, and active selection modifiers hooks arrays.
Dynamic table grid wrapping multiple instances elements of po_item_line_entry_block components, calculated tax adjustments layout sub-blocks, and a structural primary submission toolbar element.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Mono spacing applied exclusively across calculation tables to guarantee digit vertical alignment frameworks)

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.procurement_issued_blue: #3B82F6 (Corporate Royal Blue SCM Activity Target Base Accent)

color_palette_hex.validation_error_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Price Boundary Breach Highlight Line Border)

spacing_and_borders.worksheet_row_padding: 0.625rem (10px padding for ledger spreadsheet density requirements)

local_reactive_state_variables.selected_po_entity_focus_id: Tracks currently active purchase order primary row item lookup key used to inflate spreadsheet lists (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_po_wizard_visible: Boolean state flag variable dictating visibility layer boundaries for the creation interface modal overlay containers
local_reactive_state_variables.computed_running_gross_total: High-precision internal calculation variable evaluating accumulated values across row array properties items (numeric value initialized to 0.00)

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared enterprise system multi-tenant localization code parameter configuring runtimes domain parameters tracking fields
global_application_context_bindings.transactional_outbox_event_mesh: Local message bus allocation layer capturing outbound transaction completion records before transmitting downstream payloads to event streams brokers

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via ES6 asynchronous module classes implementing specific high-precision mathematical scaling overrides ensuring calculation properties retain bookkeeping compliance records parameters fields
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Recalculating itemization subtotal vectors across multi-row order spreadsheets following keystroke price change triggers must refresh user layout grids configurations inside a threshold execution limit of 6ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Map fetched array entities properties fields directly inside local variables caches blocks and bind pointer reference values straight to selected_po_entity_focus_id state tracker parameters flags
Publish creation transactional sequence records packets; insert new return data array item parameters into purchase_orders_historical_collection local cache views arrays; toggle off wizard view flags
